channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐘 php-debugger/php-debugger (350 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: php-debugger

📝 Repository: php-debugger/php-debugger

📄 Descrizione: Lightweight PHP debugger extension (forked from Xdebug, stripped to debug-only and optimized)

🍴 Forks: 9

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-05T18:13:34Z

]]>

item.title: 🐘 martinkup/symfony-profiler-optimization-advisor-bundle (35 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: martinkup

📝 Repository: martinkup/symfony-profiler-optimization-advisor-bundle

📄 Descrizione: Symfony Profiler meta data collector — reads from Doctrine, Cache, Twig, Events, HTTP Client, Messenger & Stopwatch collectors to detect N+1 queries, slow SQL, cache misses, hot templates & 10 more anti-patterns. Scores findings by impact/effort/confidence/ROI with prepared AI agent prompts. Directly queryable via AI coding tools like Claude Code.

⭐ Stelle: 35

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: cache code-quality data-collector doctrine mcp optimizer performance php-library profiling symfony symfony-profiler twig

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-05T11:20:25Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-26T11:01:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 naijagamerx/openplan.work (27 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: naijagamerx

📝 Repository: naijagamerx/openplan.work

📄 Descrizione: Open Plan is a PHP-based task management system with encrypted JSON storage. It provides task/project management, CRM, invoicing, finance tracking, inventory management, and AI-powered features. The system uses AES-256-GCM encryption for all data at rest and implements session-based authentication with CSRF protection.

🍴 Forks: 7

item.title: 🐘 jay123anta/laravel-threat-detection (22 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jay123anta

📝 Repository: jay123anta/laravel-threat-detection

📄 Descrizione: Passive threat detection middleware for Laravel. Logs SQL injection, XSS, RCE, bot scanners, 404 probes & 175+ attack patterns. Built-in dashboard, fail2ban export, Slack alerts, and REST API. IDS, not WAF.

⭐ Stelle: 22

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

🏷️ Topics: bot-detection ddos-protection fail2ban honeypot intrusion-detection laravel laravel-package middleware owasp php security security-monitoring sql-injection threat-detection waf web-application-firewall web-application-security xss xss-detection

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-03T13:11:44Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-31T07:34:54Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐘 Automattic/wordpress-atmosphere (20 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Automattic

📝 Repository: Automattic/wordpress-atmosphere

📄 Descrizione: ATmosphere connects your WordPress site to the AT Protocol network. When you publish a post, it is automatically cross-posted to Bluesky and registered as a standard.site document on your Personal Data Server (PDS).

⭐ Stelle: 20

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

item.title: 🐘 Maxiz88/laravel-eloquent-guard (19 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Maxiz88

📝 Repository: Maxiz88/laravel-eloquent-guard

📄 Descrizione: Is a lightweight, production-ready runtime performance monitor for Laravel. It detects N+1 queries and slow database operations as they happen, helping you keep your application fast and efficient

⭐ Stelle: 19

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP
